title: MikroTik Cloud Router Switch CRS112-8P-4S-IN
description: CRS112-8P-4S-IN is an eight-port Gigabit PoE Router/Switch that offers various PoE-Out power options. In addition to passive PoE, it also offers 802.3af/at standards on all eight ports. In addition to the metal ports, you can use 4 optical SFP ports to connect devices to the network at speeds of up to 1Gbps CRS112-8P-4S-IN has 2 power connectors on its back. The first 18 - 28V connector is used to connect the included DC adapter and via CRS it is then possible to power other devices connected to the PoE ports using passive PoE. Optionally, a power supply with a voltage in the range of 48 - 57V can be purchased, then the CRS112 enables devices supporting 802.3af/at standards to be powered via PoE ports For 24V output power, it is sufficient to connect the included power adapter. If you need a 48V power supply, you need to purchase a power source, e.g. GM-4820 . If you need to connect a mix of devices that require both types of power, you need to have both power supplies connected at the same time! Device Power adapter 28V / 3.4A Power cord Mounts for 19" rack Screws
specsSearch: Connectors and Interfaces LAN speed (8) 10/100/1000Mbps Gigabit LAN Yes Optical interfaces (4) 1000Mbps Serial port RJ45 Power Power type DC connector PoE type PoE-Out (only) PoE-Out standards 802.3af, 802.3at, Passive 24V PoE Out ports 8 PoE budget [W] 95 Max. power consumption [W] 10 Power via connector/terminal 18 .. 57V DC Physical characteristics Design Desktop, Rackmount Fans No Chassis design Metal Width [mm] 200 Height [mm] 40 Depth [mm] 143 Hardware CPU QCA8511 Internal storage [MB] 16 RAM [MB] 128
